query:
-- 查询物料计划
SELECT id, fileName, planStartDate, planEndDate FROM material_plans LIMIT 5;

-- 查询物料供应商映射
SELECT planId, materialCode, supplierId, sharePercentage FROM material_supplier_mappings LIMIT 10;

-- 统计每个计划中有多少个物料有多个供应商
SELECT 
  planId,
  materialCode,
  COUNT(DISTINCT supplierId) as supplier_count
FROM material_supplier_mappings
GROUP BY planId, materialCode
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT supplierId) > 1
LIMIT 20;
